creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Steven Hartland from comment #0)
Hi, thanks for your feedback about the port.

Are you talking about the condition and the message in mysql_prestart() ?

AFAIK, readlink only returns error-number in the case you've used?
Do want to check if "${mysql_dbdir}/my.cnf" and "${mysql_confdir}/my.cnf" are symlink to each other ?

Would you please explain your patch more?
Also, Which variables in the message are irrelevant?
